BLEED.name: Bleeding
BLEED.description: Bleeding. Stacks — +1 damage/turn per stack. At 4+ stacks: triggers FEAR.

POISON.name: Poisoned
POISON.description: Poisoned. 2 dmg/turn, drains a stat each turn. -2 INT — can't think straight.

BURN.name: Burning
BURN.description: On fire. 5 burst damage + 3 AoE. 30% chance to skip turn — flailing in panic.

FROST.name: Frozen
FROST.description: Frozen. -3 AGI, -3 DEF, -2 INT, take 50% more damage — numb, brittle, shatterable.

NAUSEA.name: Nauseous
NAUSEA.description: Retching. 30% skip chance. -1 all rolls — miserable and distracted.

SLUGGISH.name: Sluggish
SLUGGISH.description: Heavy. -5 AGI, -2 STR, 50% can't flee, can't use items — too weighed down.

FEAR.name: Afraid
FEAR.description: Terrified. -2 all rolls. Paralysed if HP low.

FRENZY.name: Frenzied
FRENZY.description: Berserk. +3 STR, -2 DEF, attacks random target.

CHARM.name: Charmed
CHARM.description: Enthralled. 50% skip chance. -2 DEF — guard's down.

DAZE.name: Dazed
DAZE.description: Stunned. Skip next turn. -2 AGI — seeing stars.

BORED.name: Bored
BORED.description: -2 all rolls. 10% chance to skip — yawning mid-fight.

SAD.name: Sad
SAD.description: Can't use items. -2 STR, -1 regen — too sad to fight properly. What's the point?

BLIND.name: Blind
BLIND.description: 50% miss chance. -1 DEF — can't see attacks coming.

ADRENALINE.name: Adrenaline
ADRENALINE.description: Fight response! +6 STR for 2 turns. Then the crash hits.

ADRENALINE_CRASH.name: Crash
ADRENALINE_CRASH.description: The adrenaline wore off. 50% skip, -3 STR. Body gave everything it had.

BLOODLUST.name: Bloodlust
BLOODLUST.description: Kill to heal 3. No kill = lose 3. Can't flee. Body and mind consumed.
